pages.text:
June 25th  Sat
  3.0.  We left Birmingham to come to the Wolverhampton camping shop where Simon decided not to buy the folding chair he had seen in a catalogue.  We had tea + drove onto a lovely open park land 6 miles from Stourbridge.  The children are playing foot ball.  Charles is crying alot.

July 1st  Friday
  Simon, Eve, William, Peter, John & Charles set off to Malvern for the weekend.  William is to have lunch with Murtagh.  Simon has brought along the Black & white T.V. for Eve to watch Wimbledon.
  We camped at Shuttlefast Farm after a detour via Redditch because of game on the motorway.  It is very close + rain threatens.

Sat.  The farmer's wife is friendly.  We set off back to Malvern + invited [?Reg Jarres] to have lunch with us the next day.  Simon + William has had lunch with Murtagh.  Eve has a drink + went out to the van to give Peter + John + Charles lunch.  Simon toured around to watch cricket with the boys while Eve watched Martina beat Navratilova.  Thomas arrives at 6. + we returned to the campsite.  (We had looked at [?Blackinn] earlier in the day - may camp there next time.)  More cricket at the campsite + there are 3 horses.
